dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of the most important metrics and status.
dashboard.body: The dashboard gives you a starting point for top-level system health, usage summaries, and recent activity.

catalogs.title: Catalogs
catalogs.description: Browse and manage available catalogs for configuration.
catalogs.body: Use catalogs to review available entities, organize sources, and define reusable structures.

parameters.title: Parameters
parameters.body: Parameters control system behavior and defaults across configured modules.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Create and manage reusable configuration templates.
templates.body: Templates help standardize setup patterns and reduce repetitive configuration work.

assetConfiguration.title: Asset Configuration
assetConfiguration.description: Configure asset behavior, metadata, and mappings.
assetConfiguration.body: Manage asset-specific rules and associations to ensure consistent configuration outcomes.

application.title: Application
application.description: Review application-level options and operational settings.

security.title: Security
security.description: Configure access policies and security-related settings.
security.body: Use this area to manage protections, permissions, and related governance controls.

logOut.title: Log Out
logOut.description: Sign out from the current session.
logOut.body: You can implement sign-out flow here, such as token cleanup and redirect to an authentication page.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you were looking for does not exist.
notFound.body: Use the left navigation panel to return to a valid section.
